nasb.text: For whoever has, to him more shall be given; and whoever does not have, even what he has shall be taken away from him.”

esv.text: For to the one who has, more will be given, and from the one who has not, even what he has will be taken away.”

cnv.text: 因為那有的，還要給他；那沒有的，就算他有甚麼也要拿去。”

ccb.text: 因为凡有的，还要给他更多；凡没有的，连他仅有的也要夺去！”

csbs.text: 因为凡是有的，还要赐给他；凡是没有的，连他有的也将从他那里被拿走。”
